description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named trailscraper standard checks pipeline that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has four jobs: check-and-test which runs on multiple Python versions, release-readiness-setuptools, release-readiness-docker-build, and codeql-analyse. The check-and-test job checks code style, runs tests, and sets up Python. The other jobs depend on check-and-test and perform additional tests and analysis.
